---
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

#  Deutsch for English-speakers

The lessons are structured in such an order as they should be taken in order. However, with some basic ideas in fluency, you should be able to skip around and reference them as needed.

## Lessons

1. [Nominative pronouns](01_Nominative_pronouns.qmd)
2. [Present tense verb conjugation - Regular verbs](02_Present_verb_conjugation_regular.qmd)
3. [Present tense verb conjugation - Exceptions](03_Present_verb_conjugation_exceptions.qmd)
4. [Modal verbs](04_modal_verbs.qmd)
